title: Origin
content:
Year 5026

The fight was never meant to happen.

Two figures clashed in the white void between timelines, where seconds had no meaning and history existed only as probability. Their weapons were not blades or guns, but equations, code-like symbols tearing through reality itself. Between them hovered the Reality Entity—a consciousness born from science so advanced it no longer needed a body.

One mistake.

One miscalculated strike.

Reality fractured.

Timeline branches exploded outward like shattered glass. The two fighters were torn away, screaming into different futures, different pasts. The entity followed—dragged by chaos, stripped of direction, falling endlessly.

Lost.
